en.QUEST_TAKEN_FROM_TABLE: I found an assignment where someone named Meredith is looking for her husband. I'll probably get more details from her.
en.JOVAN_LOST_ADDED_QUEST_FROM_MEREDITH: I found woman named Meredith. She is looking for her husband.
en.INFO_ABOUT_MEREDITH: I found out that I should find her at the inn.
en.INFO_ABOUT_JOVAN: Jovan left the village last evening. If the wolves haven't eaten him yet, the bandits probably killed him, but I'll look for him. She promised 8 lunars.
en.GUARD_INFO_ABOUT_JOVAN: Guard said he saw him leave the gate last night, walk along the path, and then turn west behind a large boulder. They also said there might be a pack of wolves in the area, so it's worth being prepared.
en.JOVAN_LOOK: Last time, Jovan was wearing white hat with red jacket.
en.JOVAN_PRICE: Jovan offered a few shards for his help. And that's good, I didn't expect so many wolves.
en.JOVAN_SAVED: At the last moment, just a moment longer, he would have fallen out of that tree, and the wolves would have had a nice dinner. Time to go back to Meredith for the reward.
en.JOVAN_LOST_FINISHED_POS: Jovan returned safely. Meredith gave me reward.

pl.QUEST_TAKEN_FROM_TABLE: Znalazłem zlecenie, w którym ktoś o imieniu Meredith szuka swojego męża. Więcej dowiem się od niej.
pl.INFO_ABOUT_MEREDITH: Dowiedziałem się, że znajdę ją w gospodzie.
